page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 208 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8269CL processors using the x86_64 architecture. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 208 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is equipped with 3072.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 14.77 GB of RAM per core. This high memory-to-CPU ratio positions the server for memory-intensive workloads. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Additionally, the instance does not include any GPU hardware.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. Given the massive memory capacity and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data caching layers, and complex memory-bound analytics. The hardware profile represents a high-density resource allocation, offering qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that require massive RAM footprints without the overhead of hyperthreaded virtual cores.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 208 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8269CL processors on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. It provides 3072.0 GB of RAM, which translates to 14.77 GB of memory per core, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive applications. No local storage or GPU accelerators are bundled with this instance. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This server is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and memory-bound data processing workloads.

tagline: A high-density, memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores and massive RAM capacity for demanding in-memory enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 208 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8269CL cores with no hyperthreading.
3072.0 GB of system memory providing 14.77 GB of RAM per core.
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity.
Zero bundled local storage, requiring external network-attached storage.
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERP systems.
